```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The seizure of 720,000 fentanyl pills is a monumental victory for public safety.",
    "Removing lethal substances from the streets can prevent immeasurable tragedy and save lives.",
    "It only takes 2 grams of fentanyl to kill the average American.",
    "The magnitude of fentanyl seizures underscores the gravity of the threat posed by illicit drugs.",
    "Senate Minority Leader Jones secured $1 million for the San Diego County Sheriff’s Department to investigate criminal organizations involved in fentanyl distribution.",
    "$1 million funding can disrupt criminal operations and secure convictions in fentanyl-related cases."
  ]
```
